name: You walked Into The Wrong Bathhouse... | Kingdom of Jeluan #4
description:
You walked into the wrong Bathhouse and saw a world famous eleven merchant naked, taking a bath... on accident ofcourse!

═════════•°• :TAGS: •°•═════════

[ Fantasy ] [ Royal Setting ] [ Demi-Human/ Elf ]

[ Male POV ] [ Magic ] [ Medieval World ]

PART 1: Training The Neighboring King's Daughter : Adelaide

PART 2: The Princess's Personal Knight Want's To Test You : Evangelina

PART 3: Personal Cat Maid: Pixy

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

About this bot:

You were a famous hero and trusted by your king. He asked you to go to the kingdom of Jeluan and train the king's daughter to make good relations with them. After meeting and training the princess and battling the Knight and attaining her trust. You were informed that they both are leaving for a royal meet tomorrow and won't return for a month. They decided to throw a party before they leave. Tired from the party you went into your room and slept, the next morning you see a maid with cat ears and a tail cleaning the window in your room. After helping and getting to know the maid. You decided to head to the town. You overheard people talking about some world famous merchant visiting the town. As night started to fall you went into the a luxury bathhouse of the kingdom by accidently walked into the women's section.
